laws.title: Intuitive Navigation
laws.description: Navigation should be straightforward and intuitive, helping users find content easily.
laws.remediation: Implement clear labels and a hierarchical menu structure.

laws.title: Search Functionality
laws.description: A powerful and efficient search tool to quickly lead users to desired content.
laws.remediation: Enhance search algorithms for speed and relevance, and provide filters for refining results.

laws.title: Onboarding Flow
laws.description: A seamless new user onboarding experience that is informative yet not overwhelming.
laws.remediation: Guide users with progressive disclosure and interactive tutorials.

laws.title: Error Handling
laws.description: User experience should not degrade due to input errors; provide informative error messages.
laws.remediation: Utilize inline validation and meaningful error feedback.

laws.title: Loading Times
laws.description: Pages and content should load quickly to prevent user frustration and drop-off.
laws.remediation: Optimize images, scripts, and utilize lazy loading techniques.
